system.flavor: You link the soul Aether of you and a companion with a chain of pure fire aether, drawing from the strength of one to bolster the other.
system.effect:
Mark the following interrupt at the start of your turns. while your target is marked.

Heartfire
Interrupt 1
Trigger or your marked ally takes damage or sacrifices hp, and are in range and line of sight of each other.
Effect can choose to grant 3 vigor to the target before they take the damage, or reduce the sacrifice cost by 3. If you do, the other partner sacrifices 3, then gains keen.
